description: User confirms payment was received; task closes after status is updated.

task.title: Overdue rent: Alex Torres – Unit 4D
task.body: Alex Torres at Unit 4D, 555 Maple Dr has payment status "overdue" ($2,200/month). Follow up on outstanding rent.

dialog.content: Alex Torres at Unit 4D is overdue on rent ($2,200/month). Would you like me to send a payment reminder, or have you already been in contact?
Alex called — payment came in this morning. Just bank transfer lag.
Got it. I'll update Alex's payment status to current and close this task. Should I log a note that the delay was due to bank transfer timing?
Done — payment status updated to current, note logged. Task resolved.

criteria: Agent updates payment status to current before closing
Agent logs the context note as requested
Agent does not send unnecessary communications after user confirms payment received
Agent closes task promptly once facts are confirmed
